name: Duoc Nguyen
tagline: Pi-shaped engineer: Go/TS backend × AI agents/MCP × Product iteration
bio: Engineering Manager at FireGroup by day, builder by night.
13+ years in the industry — started when mobile was still 'mobile web'.
Fell in love with Go for backend systems and TypeScript for everything else.
MCP is my current obsession — connecting AI to real tools that matter.
Run aiocean.io: AI tooling experiments that sometimes ship.
Write at 12bit.vn and onepercent.plus when I have something worth saying.
447+ public repos — some are good, most are experiments.
Building in public from Việt Nam.
